svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="_LikvHs0on_mpFpKsxUC"> <mxGraphModel dx="2417" dy="1691" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml Inter_DC_Network_Diagram
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 11
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam padding 5
skinparam nodesep 80
skinparam ranksep 60

title **Inter-Data Center Logical Network Diagram**\nSUPFile - Multi-Site Infrastructure\n

' ============================================================
' GLOBAL LAYER - DNS & LOAD BALANCING
' ============================================================
package \"Global Traffic Management\" as Global #E3F2FD;line:DarkBlue {
 [GeoDNS / GSLB\n(PowerDNS + GeoIP Module)\nfiles.supfile.com\n\nRoutes users to nearest DC\nHealth checks every 10s\nAutomatic failover if DC down] as GSLB
 note top of GSLB
 **Active/Active Load Balancing**
 EU/Africa/Asia users → Paris DC
 Americas users → New York DC
 If one DC fails → 100% to surviving DC
 TTL: 30s for fast failover
 end note
}

' ============================================================
' USER TRAFFIC
' ============================================================
cloud \"Internet Users\" as Users #LightBlue;line:DarkBlue {
 [Americas\nUsers] as US_USERS
 [EU / Asia / Africa\nUsers] as EU_USERS
}

' ============================================================
' NEW YORK DATA CENTER
' ============================================================
package \"New York Data Center\nActive/Active Primary\" as NYC #C8E6C9;line:DarkGreen {
 package \"Edge\" as NYC_EDGE #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [IPsec VPN Gateway\n(Firewall HA Pair)\n10.1.200.1] as NYC_VPN
 }
 package \"Frontend Cluster\" as NYC_FRONT #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [App Server ACTIVE\n10.1.50.10] as NYC_APP1
 [App Server PASSIVE\n(Pacemaker/Corosync)\n10.1.50.11] as NYC_APP2
 }
 package \"Database\" as NYC_DB #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [PostgreSQL PRIMARY\n(Patroni)\n10.1.60.1] as NYC_PG
 }
 package \"Storage (iSCSI SAN)\" as NYC_SAN #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [SAN Node 1\nRAID 6\n10.1.70.1] as NYC_S1
 [SAN Node 2\nRAID 6\n10.1.70.2] as NYC_S2
 [SAN Node 3\nRAID 6\n10.1.70.3] as NYC_S3
 }
 package \"Backup Agent\" as NYC_BK #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [BorgBackup Agent\n10.1.85.1] as NYC_BORG
 }
}

' ============================================================
' PARIS DATA CENTER
' ============================================================
package \"Paris Data Center\nActive/Active Primary\" as PAR #C8E6C9;line:DarkGreen {
 package \"Edge\" as PAR_EDGE #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [IPsec VPN Gateway\n(Firewall HA Pair)\n10.2.200.1] as PAR_VPN
 }
 package \"Frontend Cluster\" as PAR_FRONT #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [App Server ACTIVE\n10.2.50.10] as PAR_APP1
 [App Server PASSIVE\n(Pacemaker/Corosync)\n10.2.50.11] as PAR_APP2
 }
 package \"Database\" as PAR_DB #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [PostgreSQL HOT STANDBY\n(Streaming Replication)\n10.2.60.1] as PAR_PG
 }
 package \"Storage (iSCSI SAN)\" as PAR_SAN #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [SAN Node 1\nRAID 6\n10.2.70.1] as PAR_S1
 [SAN Node 2\nRAID 6\n10.2.70.2] as PAR_S2
 [SAN Node 3\nRAID 6\n10.2.70.3] as PAR_S3
 }
 package \"Backup Agent\" as PAR_BK #A5D6A7;line:Green {
 [BorgBackup Agent\n10.2.85.1] as PAR_BORG
 }
}

' ============================================================
' TORONTO DATA CENTER (BACKUP / DR)
' ============================================================
package \"Toronto Data Center\nBackup / DR Only\" as TOR #FFF3E0;line:DarkOrange {
 package \"Edge\" as TOR_EDGE #FFE0B2;line:Orange {
 [IPsec VPN Gateway\n(Firewall)\n10.3.200.1] as TOR_VPN
 }
 package \"Backup Storage\" as TOR_BK #FFE0B2;line:Orange {
 [BorgBackup Server\n(Deduplication Repo)\n10.3.85.1] as TOR_BORG
 [Tape Library\n(LTO-9 / GFS Rotation)\n10.3.85.2] as TOR_TAPE
 note bottom of TOR_TAPE
 **GFS Tape Rotation**
 Daily incremental: 30 tapes
 Weekly full: 12 tapes
 Monthly archive: 12 tapes
 Yearly: 5 tapes
 Offsite vault rotation
 end note
 }
 package \"DR Database\" as TOR_DB #FFE0B2;line:Orange {
 [PostgreSQL Replica\n(Delayed Standby - 24h)\n10.3.60.1] as TOR_PG
 }
 note bottom of TOR
 **Toronto DC Restrictions**
 NO user-facing traffic
 Receive-only (backup/replication)
 Activation only in DR scenario
 RTO: 4 hours | RPO: 24 hours
 end note
}

' ============================================================
' DNS / USER TRAFFIC FLOWS
' ============================================================
US_USERS ==[#DarkBlue,bold]==> GSLB : DNS Lookup
EU_USERS ==[#DarkBlue,bold]==> GSLB : DNS Lookup
GSLB ==[#DarkGreen,bold]==> NYC_VPN : **Americas users**\nA record → NYC IP
GSLB ==[#DarkGreen,bold]==> PAR_VPN : **EU/Asia/Africa users**\nA record → Paris IP

' ============================================================
' NYC ↔ PARIS : PRIMARY LINK (Dedicated Leased Line)
' ============================================================
NYC_VPN <==[#DarkBlue,bold]==> PAR_VPN : **Dedicated Leased Line**\nIPsec IKEv2 (AES-256-GCM)\n10 Gbps | ~75ms latency

' ============================================================
' NYC ↔ PARIS : BACKUP LINK (Internet VPN)
' ============================================================
NYC_VPN <.[#Orange,dashed].> PAR_VPN : //Internet IPsec VPN//\n//Backup Path//\n//1 Gbps | ~80ms latency//

' ============================================================
' REPLICATION FLOWS (NYC ↔ PARIS)
' ============================================================
NYC_PG =[#DarkGreen]=> PAR_PG : **PostgreSQL Streaming\nReplication (async)**\nWAL shipping | RPO < 5s
NYC_SAN <==[#Purple]==> PAR_SAN : **DRBD Async Replication**\nBlock-level storage sync\nRPO < 30s

' ============================================================
' BACKUP FLOWS TO TORONTO
' ============================================================
NYC_BORG ==[#DarkOrange]==> TOR_VPN : **Daily Incremental Backup**\nIPsec VPN over Internet\n2 Gbps | ~18ms latency
PAR_BORG ==[#DarkOrange]==> TOR_VPN : **Daily Incremental Backup**\nIPsec VPN over Internet\n2 Gbps | ~95ms latency
NYC_PG .[#DarkOrange,dashed].> TOR_PG : **pg_basebackup\nDaily DB dump**
TOR_BORG ==[#Orange]==> TOR_TAPE : **Weekly full → Tape**\nGFS rotation scheme

' ============================================================
' INTERNAL HA INDICATORS
' ============================================================
NYC_APP1 .[#Gray].> NYC_APP2 : Pacemaker\nHeartbeat
PAR_APP1 .[#Gray].> PAR_APP2 : Pacemaker\nHeartbeat
NYC_S1 .[#Gray].> NYC_S2 : Heartbeat
NYC_S2 .[#Gray].> NYC_S3 : Heartbeat
PAR_S1 .[#Gray].> PAR_S2 : Heartbeat
PAR_S2 .[#Gray].> PAR_S3 : Heartbeat

' ============================================================
' LEGEND
' ============================================================
legend right
 **Legend**
 |= Line Style |= Meaning |
 | <color:DarkBlue>**━━ Solid bold**</color> | Primary encrypted link (Leased Line) |
 | <color:Orange>**┈┈ Dashed**</color> | Backup encrypted link (Internet VPN) |
 | <color:DarkGreen>**━━ Green**</color> | Database replication |
 | <color:Purple>**━━ Purple**</color> | Storage (DRBD) replication |
 | <color:DarkOrange>**━━ Orange**</color> | Backup traffic to Toronto |
 | <color:Gray>**┈┈ Gray**</color> | Internal heartbeat / HA |

 **Network Addressing**
 |= Data Center |= Supernet |
 | New York | 10.1.0.0/16 |
 | Paris | 10.2.0.0/16 |
 | Toronto | 10.3.0.0/16 |

 **Encryption Standard**
 All inter-DC: IPsec IKEv2
 Cipher: AES-256-GCM
 Auth: RSA-4096 certificates
 PFS: DH Group 21 (ECP-521)
 Key rotation: Every 8 hours

 **Availability Targets**
 |= Scenario |= RTO |= RPO |
 | Single server failure | < 30s | 0 |
 | Full DC failure (NYC or Paris) | < 2 min | < 30s |
 | Catastrophic (both main DCs) | 4 hours | 24 hours |

 **Cost Optimization**
 NYC↔Paris: 1 leased line + 1 internet VPN
 To Toronto: Internet VPN only (backup traffic)
 No leased line to Toronto (cost saving)
endlegend

@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="APMUYzW-3VmoJCd0QvlZ-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="3349" width="3488" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 3488px; height: 3349px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: initial;
svg.title: **Inter-Data Center Logical Network Diagram** SUPFile - Multi-Site Infrastructure

g.text: If one DC fails → 100% to surviving DC
To Toronto: Internet VPN only (backup traffic)
No leased line to Toronto (cost saving)
